title: Wancle Electric Burr Coffee Grinder - Adjustable with 28 Precise Grind Settings for 12 Cups - Professional Coffee Bean Grinder (Plastic, Black)
description:
About this item
✅ [Consistent Flavor Extraction]: Our electric burr coffee grinder offers 28 precise grinding settings, allowing you to adjust it freely according to your taste, from coarse to fine grinding. This ensures that every cup of coffee has a good, even grind and flavor extraction while retaining the oils without generating excessive heat.
✅ [On-Demand Control, Perfect for 2-12 Cups]: This coffee grinder features on-demand grinding control, allowing you to choose the amount of coffee to grind as needed, from as little as 2 cups to as many as 12 cups, customizing the perfect amount of coffee grounds for you.
✅ [Convenient Operation, Low Noise]: Our professional coffee bean grinder is easy to use. Simply adjust the coarseness setting, set the number of cups, and press the switch button, letting the grinder automatically complete the rest of the work. Plus, it operates quietly, without disturbing others.
✅ [Easy to Clean]: Wancle burr coffee grinder's plastic container is specially treated to prevent static electricity and coffee grounds from sticking. It's also equipped with a brush for easy cleaning.
✅ [Compact and Lightweight, Suitable for Storage]: This burr grinder is designed to be compact and extremely easy to use. It fits into various kitchen spaces and can be stored effortlessly.
✅ Voltage: 100-120V, Power: 200W
reviews_5s: I finally broke down & bought an electric grinder because my shoulder is so bad off I can barely grind my morning brew. I was worried the beans would taste burnt as has been my experience in the past. This grinder does the beans slower & more delicately, preserving the flavor. It holds & grinds enough for my French press pot & doesn't seem to bother my cat at all with its low volume grind. Does a great job & tucks away nicely where I had my manual grinder.This is a pretty cool little grinder. Smaller than we imagined but does great work. Love the settings for different sizes to grind and different quantities (2-12cups). Makes it easy to grind just the right amount. All in all works really good and is convenient.This is a good burr grinder. You really have to test how it grinds for each type of bean. One setting for a bean is not the same for another. We had a bag of beans that had a lot of oil on them and they were apparently softer that other beans, so the setting we used for our other bag of beans ground the current bag almost to an espresso ground. Test the beans and grind first before placing a large patch of beans in the grinder. Overall, it is a good value.I really like form factor, and ease to use it, gets the job done, nothing else to sayThis burr coffee grinder is well made and easy to use easy to clean and does a great job grinding the coffee beans to a perfect consistency. The small bean hopper insures that the beans stay fresh because it only holds enough beans for two days use.I live in a small condo with very little counter space in the kitchen. This grinder is perfect. It's small but with all its settings, you can go from drip to espresso easily. I highly recommend this grinder.Does a great job. Bure grinders do the best job and this is a good one. When taking apart pay attention how to put it back together. I had to watch an online video as the grinder part has to be aligned correctly or you will never get it back together and working again.Is smaller than I thought, but perfect for what we need with just two coffee drinkers in the house. Provides a consistent grind and is quieter than my previous coffee grinder. Happy with it so far.I am very happy with the quality and functionality of this grinder. It's not as noisy as some reviewers had stated. Just about the same as my previous grinder.I read posts recommending way more expensive grinders but thought I would try this first and happy I did. I does get a little messy so put it in a large try for easy clean up
reviews_1s:
I struggled through using it to make my cold brew for a few months, probably should have just returned it since now it’s too late. Gets clogged and has to be taken apart to clean out constantly, now it just completely stopped working and I had to purchase something else…I was hoping to upgrade from my blade grinder, unfortunately this was definitely a downgrade. Will not work on the fine setting, and sometimes takes several cycles to grind even a small amount. Super loud and clunky to disassemble and reassemble.I will never buy electronics from Amazon again.
When my product stopped working after a couple months customer service said that they couldn't help because a couple months passed after purchase.The primary task of a coffee grinder is to grind the beans. This fails unless you only grind at very coarse settings.I learned my lesson that you get what you pay for on this purchase. I decided on this grinder after almost buying a more expensive name brand grinder and it was a huge mistake. This thing makes a huge mess, coffee grinds go everywhere because of the design and static. It doesn’t turn off automatically like it says it will. Really disappointing.website was glacially slow.I tried it as soon as I got it following the instructions and it couldn’t grind all the beans and started to smoke from the bottom!! Not good!Had this for 3 months and it completely died today. Smells like it’s burning up. Wasted money.For me, I don't know others' experience, the grind was pretty much the same at different settings. Did not live up to its hype.No está quebrado
